stereotype: «Client» — agentic MCP entry surface; fronts the same six Managers as webClient over the MCP protocol (stdio/HTTP)
volatility: CustomerInteractionChannel (agentic channel) + Transport (MCP stdio/HTTP, two instances behind one seam) + MCP tool-schema projection (Manager OpenAPI op → MCP tool descriptor)

inbound.name: MCP host (Claude Code, claude.ai, any MCP client)

outbound.name: projectManager
outbound.how: direct, by value — start/signal/query (Amendment A1); invokeTool resolves one target op

outbound.name: systemDesignManager
outbound.how: direct, by value — one Manager per call

outbound.name: projectDesignManager
outbound.how: direct, by value — one Manager per call

outbound.name: constructionManager
outbound.how: direct, by value — one Manager per call

outbound.name: operationsManager
outbound.how: direct, by value — one Manager per call

outbound.name: billingManager
outbound.how: direct, by value — one Manager per call

outbound.name: security
outbound.how: direct, by value — resolvePrincipal + authorize before every Manager call

ops.note: Projects the frozen Manager OpenAPI vocabulary into MCP tool descriptors; calls no Manager; idempotent and side-effect-free

fields.name: principal
fields.note: resolved edge-trusted principal from MCP host claims; used to filter catalog to tools this principal may see

fields.name: Tools
fields.note: set of MCP tool descriptors {toolName, title, inputSchema, outputSchema} derived from frozen Manager OpenAPI specs via the tool-schema projection rule

ops.signature: invokeTool(principal: Principal, toolName: ToolName, args: ToolArgs) → ToolResult
ops.note: Authorizes, resolves one target Manager op from the projection table, and relays the call; each invocation routes to exactly one Manager

fields.name: principal
fields.note: resolved edge-trusted principal; authorize(principal, action, resource) called before any Manager call; rejects on Deny

fields.name: toolName
fields.note: generated MCP tool name (projected from frozen Manager OpenAPI specs); must be in principal's ToolCatalog

fields.name: args
fields.note: typed request payload schema-validated against the tool's inputSchema; InvalidArgument if validation fails

fields.name: Content
fields.note: typed Manager reply marshaled as MCP tool result content

fields.name: (error)
fields.note: structured error carrying framework-go error kind mapped to MCP surface: permission_denied / invalid_argument / failed_precondition / not_found / conflict / unavailable / internal

ops.signature: readProjectState(principal: Principal, projectId: ProjectId, view?: StateView) → ProjectStateView
ops.note: Agent continuity read: routes to one Manager read op by view (getProject / getSessionState / queryCostProjection); mutates nothing

fields.name: principal
fields.note: authorize for read scope on projectId before routing

fields.name: projectId
fields.note: project aggregate identity (name-shaped business key; server resolves identity)

fields.name: view
fields.note: optional selector: full head-state, or a single session/artifact slice; selects target Manager read op

fields.name: State
fields.note: typed Method head-state JSON (same typed models the SPA renders); untransformed from Manager read op result

dataContracts: Principal = resolved edge-trusted principal (from MCP host claims)
ToolName = generated MCP tool name (projected from frozen Manager OpenAPI specs)
ToolArgs = schema-validated typed request payload for the named tool
ToolCatalog = set of MCP tool descriptors {toolName, title, inputSchema, outputSchema}
ToolResult = typed Manager reply marshaled as an MCP tool result
ToolError = structured error carrying framework-go error kind; kinds: permission_denied / invalid_argument / failed_precondition / not_found / conflict / unavailable / internal
ProjectId = project aggregate identity (name-shaped business key; server resolves identity)
StateView = optional selector: full head-state or single session/artifact slice
ProjectStateView = typed Method head-state JSON (same typed models the SPA renders)
errorModel: framework-go error kinds marshaled to structured ToolError; Client fails closed: security error or unmapped error → non-retryable tool error. permission_denied (Unauthorized/Deny), invalid_argument (InvalidArgument), failed_precondition (FailedPrecondition), not_found (NotFound), conflict (Conflict — retryable by agent), unavailable (Transient/Infrastructure — retryable), internal (ContractMisuse/ContentPolicy — terminal).
idempotency: invokeTool: idempotency owned by the target Manager (durable workflow). readProjectState: pure read, trivially idempotent. listTools: pure read of committed build-time descriptors, idempotent.

revisions.summary: Initial contract: IMcpEntry with 3 ops (listTools, invokeTool, readProjectState); factored by MCP adapter jobs not by Manager op; single tagged-dispatch invokeTool; transport hidden; no Temporal-kind column

APPROVED — FROZEN. 9/9 PASS. Amendments: fan-out seam-status note added (projectManager D-PM-pending noted, C-CM ordering gate recorded); status flipped DRAFT → APPROVED-FROZEN. OQ-1 single-dispatch ratified; OQ-2 build-time codegen recommended (C-CM choice); OQ-3 noted out of D-CM boundary; OQ-4 keep one contract; OQ-5 new-adapter-job guardrail confirmed.
